name: tree
title: BTTree
description: Recursive data-driven tree component. Pass a list of BTTreeNode objects — nesting depth is inferred from children arrays, expand/collapse state is managed internally with a CSS grid-template-rows animation, and level-based background tinting is applied automatically.

files.content:
export { default as BTTree } from './BTTree.vue';
export type { BTTreeProps, BTTreeNode, BTTreeItemCheckState } from './BTTree.types';
